name: com.pulsemcp/hatchbox
description: MCP server for Hatchbox Rails hosting — env var inspection, deploys, and process monitoring.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHBOX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for authentication with Hatchbox.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHBOX_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Hatchbox account ID visible in the dashboard URL.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHBOX_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Hatchbox application ID visible in the dashboard URL.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHBOX_DEPLOY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Deployment webhook key for triggering deployments.

environmentVariables.name: WEB_SERVER_IP_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: IP address of Hatchbox server for SSH access to read environment variables.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to SSH private key for server access.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHBOX_APP_NAME
environmentVariables.description: App name to filter processes if multiple apps run on the same server.

environmentVariables.name: READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to false to enable write operations for environment variables.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_DEPLOYS
environmentVariables.description: Set to false to disable deployment operations.
